titleStmt.title: SII 17.596: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 596. (A.R. No. 551 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.
The details of date given viz. Year 40, Ś. 1229, Mīṉa ba. 10, Monday, Tiruvōṇam, regularly correspond to 1308 A.D., March 18, Monday. The Śaka date 1229 is given at the end.

This epigraph records a grant of land in Śiṟunallūr a brahmadēya in Tēvūr-nāḍu in Gēyamāṇikka-vaḷanāḍu as tirunāmattukkāṉi to god Tiruvārūruḍaiyār by Vēḷāṉ Koṅgil-piḷḷaiyāṉ of Kaḻaṉivāyil in Eyil-nāḍu in Pāṇḍikulapati-vaḷanāḍu. The lands are stated to have been purchased for this purpose even in the 32nd year of the king but were in the enjoyment of the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmar tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 vatu mīṉanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu daśamiyum tiṅkaḷkkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa tiruvoṇattu nāḷ Uṭaiyār tiruvāruruṭaiyār koyilkaṇkāṇiceyvārkaḷukkum koyil mutalk karaṇattārkkum pāṇṭikulapativaḷanāṭṭu Eyilnāṭṭu kaḻaṉivāyiluṭaiyāṉ veḷāṉ koṅkilppiḷḷaiyāṉeṉ Iṉṉāyanārkkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyākak kuṭutta Ittevaṟkku 3 10 2 vatumutal Iṉṉāḷvarai nāṉ tirunāmattukkāṇiyākak kuṭu vatu keyamāṇikkavaḷanāṭṭu tevūrnāṭṭu brahmadeśam ciṟunallūril Irācākkaḷ tampirāṉāṟṟukku vaṭakaraippaṭṭa nilattu nāṉ palar pakkalilum Eṉperālum Eṉ makaṉ tevarkaḷtevaṉ perālum Ivaṉtampi svātantryayapperumāḷ peyarālum vilaikoṇṭu Ivūril gautamaṉ keśavapaṭṭaṉ pakkal piṭāvūruṭaiyāṉ pakkal kṛtāvatiyākaRead kṛtāvadhiyāka.nāṉ vilaikoṇṭum kūmur māṭalaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ carmmaṉ pakkal Iṉṉāyaṉārkku tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāka peci
vilaikoṇṭa nilamumāy Eṉṉutāy nāṉ Innāḷvaraiyum Aṉupavittu ponta viḷainilaṅkaḷum paṭukaikaḷum kollaikaḷum Ūrnattattu maṉaikaḷumāy 3 10 2 vatu ṉāḷilum Inta nāṟpatāvatu nāḷilum nāṉ tirunāmattukkāṇiyākak kuṭuttu Inilaṅkaḷukku vilaikoṇṭa pramāṇaṅkaḷum kuṭuttu Itukku Iṭṭukkoṭutta taṭi Uḷvarippaṭi viḷai � pattaraiye mukkāṇiyum paṭukai nilam Iraṇṭe Irumāvaraiyum kollaikaḷum teṟkil nattamum nilam veli Āka nilam patimuṉṟaraiye muṉṟu mākkaThis may be restored as ‘kāṇiyum’•••• vaṭakkil Ūr nattattu māṭalaṉ tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ maṉai Oṉṟum gautamaṉ kecavapaṭṭaṉ maṉaiyum Iṟṟaināḷāl tiruṉāmat tukkāṇiyākak kuṭutteṉ kaḻaṉivāyiluṭaiyāṉ veḷāṉ koṅkilppiḷḷaiyāṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu Iṉṉāḷāvatu śakāpitam 1000 2 100 2 10 9 .
Digital edition of SII 17.596 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
